title: A rechargeable non-aqueous Mg–O<sub>2</sub> battery based on magnesium peroxide chemistry
abstract: Published online: 03 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41557-026-02199-2 Rechargeable magnesium–oxygen batteries could offer high <mark>energy density</mark>, but poor reversibility has limited their development. Now it has been shown that tailoring the Mg2+ solvation environment enables reversible magnesium peroxide chemistry and stable cycling in a non-aqueous battery.
